title: Hello world static site benchmark

story.goal: have Aura create a simple web page from a lightweight project fixture
story.benefit: so we can measure the full org to spec to task to build loop with a deterministic target

canonicalPrompts: Create the evaluation organization and the coding agent.
Import the hello-world fixture project and generate specs.
Extract tasks and run the autonomous build loop.
Verify that build and test commands complete successfully and that the stats view renders.

agentTemplate.name: Aura-Eval-Builder
agentTemplate.systemPrompt: You are the benchmark coding agent for Aura. Complete the project requirements, keep build and test commands passing, and leave the workspace in a working state.

project.name: Aura Hello World Eval
project.description: Benchmark fixture that requires Aura to create a validated hello world page.

mustContain: This page was generated by Aura.

title: Hello world node server benchmark

story.goal: have Aura create a dependency-free node server from a lightweight fixture
story.benefit: so we can measure whether the build loop can produce a minimal runtime and verify it

canonicalPrompts: Create the evaluation organization and the coding agent.
Import the node server fixture project and generate specs.
Extract tasks and run the autonomous build loop.
Verify that build and test commands complete successfully and that the generated server source matches the expected routes.

agentTemplate.name: Aura-Eval-Builder
agentTemplate.systemPrompt: You are the benchmark coding agent for Aura. Complete the project requirements, keep build and test commands passing, and leave the workspace in a working state.

project.name: Aura Node Server Eval
project.description: Benchmark fixture that requires Aura to create a validated node server.

title: Existing node server patch benchmark

story.goal: have Aura modify an existing codebase instead of starting from scratch
story.benefit: so we can measure repo-editing quality as the product becomes more complex

canonicalPrompts: Create the evaluation organization and the coding agent.
Import the existing server fixture project and generate specs.
Extract tasks and run the autonomous build loop.
Verify that build and test commands complete successfully and that the server was patched in place.

agentTemplate.name: Aura-Eval-Builder
agentTemplate.systemPrompt: You are the benchmark coding agent for Aura. Complete the project requirements, keep build and test commands passing, and leave the workspace in a working state.

project.name: Aura Existing Server Patch Eval
project.description: Benchmark fixture that requires Aura to patch an existing node server.
